desc_en: This pendant sharpens the focus, allowing for more precise hits.
A useful off-hand item to block hits from enemies.
Odd necklace made from a fish that never let go of the hook.
Simple ring carved out of stone.
A luminous type of lure that increases the chance of pulling up loot.
A well-seasoned type of lure that attracts fish and other things more quickly.
An icky type of lure that may stick on to fish that didn't even bite.
A sugary type of lure that increases the chance of catching fish instead of loot.
A mysterious feather that allows you to dash out of danger.
Sticky necklace infused with energy made for an unknown purpose.
Allows the bearer to reach further sources of wisdom.
A status symbol among tribal cavelings. You can sense blood lust from the loose tooth.
A luminous ring that holds the essence of glow tulips.
A heart berry on the neck makes for an easy snack!
A gooey ring dripping slippery slime on the floor.
A ring from the depths that someone must have lost long time ago.
A golden necklace featuring a big, shiny heart. You feel something you can't describe, when wearing it so close to your own.
A golden ring featuring a candy-colored heart. The perfect gift to give to someone you like.
A blood-red ring that latches onto your finger.
A rusted skull crest turning conjured sparks of life into ones of lesser death.
Wearing this winged ring creates a slight wind that pushes you forward.
A simple ring that forms a magical veil.
A precious ring featuring ancient gemstones.
Has a small hourglass on top. The sand within has stopped flowing down.
A heavy piece of jewelry that increases defense.
A heraldic shield offering significant protection from attacks.
A living ring, not for the squirmish to wear.
Simple but beautiful necklace featuring a fossil.
Natural grown jewelry made from rare bubble pearls.
A shiny trinket combining the most valuable of materials.
A quite lively little ring that tries to swim off of your finger. By the time it realizes it's merely a ring it has already forgot about it again.
This odd necklace seems to have a life of its own.
A true trinket of the sea, made from kelp and a trident pendant. Mistaking you for a mythic sea ruler, fish come to you more often.
A peculiar handheld device, used for short range teleportation.
Simple ring found in the deepest of rocks.
A cursed ring that was used to welcome the cold season into the lands. It represents decay and darkness.
A blessed necklace offered as a gift to farewell the warm season. It represents the harvest and the evening sun.
The claw marks in this rock reveal dormant energies inside, waiting to be awoken.
An ancient book with stitched blue covers. Is that skin?
A necklace made from a fuse tied to a tiny bomb. Hold on to your head if it sizzles right next to your ear.
A pointy lure that can stick to fish from the outside to catch more and catch them faster.
A wiggly lure that looks like a red worm, large enough to allow more than one fish to get caught sometimes.
A blob of slime with a tiny crown in its center. With the right headpiece you can reign over all slimes.
A translucent ring that looks like a wave frozen in time.
A morbid necklace made from tiny caveling skulls. They're too small to have been children.
A grotesque blood-red ring, crested with a tiny caveling skull.
A colorful talon feather from Azeos, the Sky Titan. By holding it you can dash at a high speed.
An old crystal ring, holding it fills you with a sad feeling you can't describe.
Grants the bearer access to deeper wellsprings of power.
A curved twig holding a golden egg at its end. It is a sign of renewal and fertility.
An organic ring grown from slime covered thorns.
A ring made of leaves and small golden eggs. It is a sign of emerging life and spring.
A precious ring that has naturally grown in the yellow blossoms of the jungle caves.
An odd, ornate ring. You feel a closer bond with your minions whilst wearing it.
A shimmering lure that catches the eye of more rare fish.
This pendant used to look pretty but now it's rusted to the core.
A shield covered in toxic grime. Has a chance to poison enemies when blocking attacks.

conditions.label: Chance To Apply Poison On Block

desc_en: An animalistic emblem decorated with golden trinkets that ring out to the wild.
A wooden ring with two smaller rings around it. One symbolizes the warden and the other the bonded beast.
A simple wooden ring, nothing more, nothing less.
A circular, brambly root with sharp thorns pointing outward.
A necklace crafted with only using ancient gemstones as well as a super rare white version.
A truly powerful relic of the past, made for fending off the strongest of foes.
Forged from a piece of the sky titan's beak.
A necklace made with a pretty coral badge and white pebbles.
This golden ring is very uncomfortable to wear but it looks really cool.
A strange ring that pulls in loot around you in a higher radius. Magnets, how do they work?
A soft ring slowly releasing mold spores.
A circle of white organic filaments, it latches onto the skin.
Jewelry made from a rare plant that repels poison.
The scarlet variant of an iron chunk necklace. It raises your defense even more and gives additional benefits.
This ring reminds you of the wide open sky.
A precious little ring with a yellow gemstone on top.
The unsettling gaze of this ring causes minions to stay on high alert.
This ring is made from a milky, translucent material. The light it reflects makes it harder for enemies to hit you.
A relic that is made in the same way as the Ancient Guardian Necklace, made for fending off the strongest of foes.
A sturdy card that once belonged to a citizen of the forlorn metropolis. It's thousand of years old but the excellent print hasn't faded.
This rare jellyfish seems to do well without water and apparently it likes your company.
A cheaply made ring from a vending machine. If you believe hard enough you may feel more lucky.
A magnet with an impressive draw that defies the limits of electromagnetics.
A necklace made from pure octarine filled with magic energy.
A ring made from pure octarine enhanced with magic properties.
An extremely durable shield infused with energy that increases health while holding it.
A golden piece of jewelry that's not put onto the finger but rather on the nose.
A piece of jewelry for the neck that's merely a hoop with a gap. Worn by many different cultures throughout world history.
This mysterious ring is entirely made out of ancient gemstones, featuring a super rare white one.
A primitive piece of jewelry made from small bones. Early humans have also made these for many different reasons.
A prehistoric, crude ring made from bone. Rings like these have been discovered in early human graves.
A knife attached to a wrist band hidden among layers of fabric. It's perfect for an unsuspected stealth attack.
A beautiful necklace featuring a small shell. When you hold it up to your ear you can hear distant waves.
An intricate ring naturally grown from pink, branchy corals.
This lure consists of multiple edible and magical components, attracting the one big catch that lingers in deep waters. Is consumed on successful use.
A strange, little loop made from blue slime, it almost slides off of your finger.
An expensive looking ring featuring a ruby. It must have belonged to someone wealthy.
A big blue diamond is the centerpiece of this extraordinary treasure. You feel loved when holding it up to your chest.
A piece of jewelry with a striking likeness to the sea titan. Wearing it you feel in tune with the Sunken Sea, enhancing your body in multiple ways.
A plated looping tentacle that wraps around your finger. Stemming from a titan, it enhances your might in fighting these giant monsters.
This pendant sharpens the focus, allowing for more precise hits.
A necklace made with a pretty coral badge and white pebbles.
A luminous ring that holds the essence of glow tulips.
A shiny trinket combining the most valuable of materials.
A precious ring featuring ancient gemstones.
This golden ring is very uncomfortable to wear but it looks really cool.
A heavy piece of jewelry that increases defense.
A strange ring that pulls in loot around you in a higher radius. Magnets, how do they work?
A necklace made from pure octarine filled with magic energy.
A ring made from pure octarine enhanced with magic properties.
The scarlet variant of an iron chunk necklace. It raises your defense even more and gives additional benefits.
Wearing this winged ring creates a slight wind that pushes you forward.
The discarded breast piece of a core sentry. It has just the right size to be used as a great shield and the ancient gemstone in its center sometimes shoots out energy as it blocks enemy attacks.

conditions.label: Chance To Shoot Shock Wave On Block

desc_en: A ring found at the skeleton of a giant ocean creature. It's made from tiny cervical vertebrae.
A hard shell that once belonged to a graceful sea creature. You feel much more protected when holding it.
A necklace made from pitch-black metal that leaves dark smudges on your neck.
This ring is made to be put on two fingers at the same time. Revolutionary.
This strange ring produces a flame that affects anything but its wearer.
This pristine crystal is filled with energy. It makes you feel determined.
Made from ragged cloth and metal badges this witness of the desert gives you a keen advantage on attacks.
This small finger band is made from ragged cloth to keep it from heating up in the scorching desert valleys.
The sharp mouth piece of Omoroth, the Sea Titan. It seems to be able to crush every material.
A ring made from pitch-black metal, darkened by the constant presence of immense heat.
A ring crowned with a little bomb idol. Handling explosives while wearing it results in an even stronger blast.
A very big ancient gemstone fused from smaller shards. It emits a strange energy that makes you feel nauseous and feverish.
A mysterious necklace with a burning pendant. It glows intensively but doesn't scorch the skin.
A misshappen necklace that combines chunks of all kinds of materials.
The complete set of oracle cards. Bringing them together strangely restored the cards to perfect condition and now they emit a powerful, enlightening aura.
A necklace of the desert with a strong resemblance of the sand titan. Wearing it grants you additional protection and extra damage.
A strange ring made from sand that is held together by the currents of time.
Reinforced with several rare materials, this glove can withstand great heat and is a must have for every experienced blacksmith.
A manufactured crystal that looks like the eye of the core. This one is raw and unfinished, as if something interrupted the process.
An icy ring that imbues the holder with powers of the cold elements.

conditions.label: Chance On Hit To Apply Slippery Movement

desc_en: A leafy ring that imbues the holder with powers of the poisonous nature.
A captivating ring that catches your enemies off-guard so that they lower their defense. Unfortunately it has the same effect on you.
The heavy top part of a hydra's skull. Made to withstand deep pressure within the earth, it makes for a great protection in battle.
The long fang of a hydra. It emanates a primal energy that is waiting to be harnessed.
It's Bob the pet rock. Don't drop or throw him, he has feelings too.
A scorching necklace that imbues the holder with powers of the burning heat.
The crust of molten rock, formed to be wielded like a shield.

conditions.label: Deal Aoe Fire Damage On Block

desc_en: This organic necklace looks like a miniature version of the Atlantean Worm. Maybe it is a juvenile that would grow to become as large as its origin.
An organic ring that looks like one of the segments of the Atlantean Worm. It must have grown inside its body as an anomaly.
A captivating necklace that catches your enemies off-guard so that they lower their defense. Unfortunately it has the same effect on you.
A depressing stone amulet. You hear whispering...
A necklace featuring a coiling shell. Its ever turning spiral structure is captivating.

A symbiosis of an ancient gemstone with organic matter, resulting in a physically impossible material. It pulsates in energetic rhythms of three, a celestial pattern that must have been of utter importance to a spacefaring species.
A ring with tiny sconces that come ablaze with purple flames when you wear it.
A nut fastener just the right size for your finger.
A pristine skull crest turning conjured sparks of life into ones of greater death.
For when you want to make things go boom, but from a comfy distance!
A perfectly black trinket that absorbs any light cast upon it.
